free_text: Measurements of the total cross section of natural Be
with thermal neutrons from a photo-neutron source
School of Materials Science and Engineering,
Natural beryllium (9Be) plate with thickness of 10 mm,
and 10 x 10 cm2 in the cross-sectional area.
The total statistical uncertainties for the
measured total cross sections are varied from 2% to
6% as a function of the neutron energy.
Longxiang Liu: With the addition of statistics, the
Fig.10 of Nucl. Instrum. Methods in Phys. Res.,
B 410(2017)158. Data were obtained from first Author.
